title: quercus peduncularis
intro: Quercus peduncularis, also known as the Bur Oak, is a species of deciduous tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, sore throat, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Quercus peduncularis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Quercus peduncularis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
